data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having backup options if one vendor cancels. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm the existence of such backup options in the system. While there is a mention of a backup indoor route activated due to rain during the tour, this does not directly address the requirement of having alternative vendors in case of cancellation, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of backup vendor options if one vendor cancels.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
